metadata.score_convention: SIGNED per mission directive: negative sentiment = negative score (-1.0 to < -0.20); neutral = -0.20 to +0.20 (marginal/mixed band); positive = > +0.20 to +1.0. A wider neutral band preserves the 'marginal/mixed' nuance for entities where offsetting forces net to near-zero (e.g. PN operational-deepening vs toksik-attack; Hadi coalition-building vs blame-shift). rev1-9 used unsigned magnitude; rev10+ converted; cross-revision comparisons require sign-aware reading.
